title: Black World Generation
description: World Generation and some new structure
body:
# Black World Generation Modpack

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40ca189c22832144966e3b6ed9420d80c6f4b3c6.png)

Welcome to the **Black World Generation** modpack! This modpack enhances the Minecraft world generation experience by incorporating a carefully curated set of mods focused on expanding and improving the variety, detail, and overall feel of Minecraft's landscapes. Whether you're an explorer, builder, or just enjoy the beauty of a richly generated world, this modpack has something for you.

## Features

### Enhanced World Generation

- **Terralith**: Adds over 85 new biomes to the Overworld, each with unique terrain, vegetation, and structures, making exploration more rewarding.
- **Biomes O' Plenty**: Further expands the diversity of biomes, adding unique plant life, trees, and terrain features.
- **Regions Unexplored**: Introduces even more biomes with distinct environmental features, increasing the variety in world generation.
- **Tectonic**: Overhauls the terrain generation to create realistic mountain ranges, valleys, and plateaus.
- **BetterEnd & BetterNether**: Transforms the End and Nether dimensions with new biomes, structures, and resources, making these often overlooked dimensions worth exploring.
- **MES - Moog's End Structures**: Adds new structures to the End dimension, providing more opportunities for exploration and loot.
- **MVS - Moog's Voyager Structures**: Introduces new structures to the Overworld, adding more points of interest to discover.
- **Additional Structures**: Adds more structures scattered across the world, ensuring that exploration always leads to new and interesting locations.

### Visual Enhancements

- **Iris Shaders**: Allows the use of shaders for enhanced visual effects and lighting.
- **Sodium**: Provides significant performance improvements and optimizations for better gameplay.
- **Lithium**: Further optimizes the game's performance, ensuring a smooth experience even with all the enhancements.
- **Snow! Real Magic! ⛄**: Enhances snow mechanics, allowing for more realistic snow accumulation and interaction.

### Utilities and Tools

- **Waystones**: Adds a teleportation system via waystones, allowing for easy travel between key locations.
- **Mod Menu**: A handy interface to view and configure mods within the game.
- **Chunky**: A world pre-generation tool to reduce lag by preloading chunks.
- **Text Placeholder API**: Provides utility functions for text management within the game.
- **World Weaver**: Enhances the customization and management of world generation settings.
- **Forge Config API Port & Balm**: Compatibility mods that ensure smooth integration and operation of various other mods.

### Backend and API Support

- **Fabric API**: The core library required for most Fabric mods, ensuring compatibility and functionality.
- **Kiwi 🥝**: A dependency library that supports multiple mods with utility functions.
- **BCLib**: A library mod that supports the functionality of BetterEnd and BetterNether.
- **GlitchCore & Noisium**: Provide additional backend support for world generation and structural placement, enhancing mod compatibility and functionality.


## Recommendations

- Use a shader pack with Iris for the best visual experience.
- Allocate at least 4-6 GB of RAM for Minecraft to ensure smooth gameplay with all the mods.
- Regularly back up your world, especially before adding or removing mods.

## Support and Feedback

If you encounter any issues, have suggestions, or just want to share your experience, feel free to leave a comment on the Modrinth page or join our community Discord server (link available on the Modrinth page). Your feedback is invaluable in helping us improve the modpack!

## Credits

Special thanks to all the amazing mod developers whose work is included in this modpack. Your creativity and hard work make the Minecraft experience more enjoyable for everyone.

Enjoy exploring the richly generated worlds of **Black World Generation**!
